## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, wireframe revisions, and operational blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The first two articles ("Upskilling" & "Literacy") will publish this week, marking a major project milestone.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [The new "Skillshare" (or "Knowledge Base") hub wireframes will be revised to move the search bar above categories and implement infinite scroll.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [GrowthX will take over publishing and image creation after the new hub launches, pending a test pipeline to prove brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [GA4 access remains blocked, but PageSpeed LCP has improved from \~10s to \~2s, a significant performance gain.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Publishing

  - [**First Articles Publishing:**](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
      - ["AI Upskilling" & "AI Literacy" articles are approved for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
      - [Justin will assign Steve as the author; publishing is set for this week.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [**Revision Pipeline Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Katya is optimizing the revision pipeline to reduce QC lift for both teams.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [This optimization delayed this week's article delivery from Wednesday to today/tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**New Content Assignments:**](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [\~30 new article assignments are in Airtable, focused on "AI Upskilling" & "AI Literacy" to support existing pillar pages.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [Justin requested a marker in Airtable to identify pillar page assignments, which require more author planning.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [**Future Publishing Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**Goal:** GrowthX to take over publishing and image creation to reduce Udemy's workload.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**Timeline:** After the new hub launches and both teams are familiar with the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
      - [**Image Creation:** GrowthX will create a test pipeline to generate sample images for Udemy's approval, demonstrating brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)

### New Hub Wireframe Revisions

  - [**Name:** "Skillshare" or "Knowledge Base" (TBD).](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Key Revisions:**](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Move search bar above categories.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [Implement infinite scroll for articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [Make topic categories sticky on scroll.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [Use normal text for the hub name on category pages (e.g., "Skillshare") for a consistent brand cue.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [**Mobile:** Categories will scroll horizontally, mirroring the consumer site experience.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Article Pages:** Will use the existing format, adding a CTA banner and related articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

### Operational Blockers & Performance

  - [**GA4 Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [Access for GrowthX is still blocked.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [Justin has escalated the ticket and will continue to follow up.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [**Rationale:** GA4 is the primary analytics tool for the Udemy Business (UB) site, using custom events.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**PageSpeed Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
      - [LCP has improved from \~10s to \~2s.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
      - [**Significance:** This is a major performance gain expected to positively impact all site metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [**Reference Material Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [GrowthX needs more gated resources for future articles to ensure a consistent brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Hack:** Append `/thanks` to any gated URL to bypass the form and download the asset directly.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Justin:**](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
      - [Publish "AI Upskilling" & "AI Literacy" articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
      - [Schedule a call next week with stakeholders to finalize the new hub timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [Send gated resources to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [Continue following up on the GA4 access ticket.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [Deliver this week's articles today/tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [Add a "pillar page" marker to Airtable assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
      - [Revise the wireframe brief to reflect the discussed changes.](https://fathom.video/share/KkRgkCmxxqsrjkr2bUY-GJVixTYH-SPY?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
